captures.chat_api_path: /github/chat/threads/{threadId}/messages  (host: api.individual.githubcopilot.com, separate from github.com). Thread name set via /github/chat/threads/{threadId}/name. Aux: github.com/github-copilot/chat/repositories_search.
captures.transport_protocol: SSE. Chat completion streamed from dedicated API host api.individual.githubcopilot.com (NOT github.com). Telemetry to collector.github.com (POST 204).
captures.success_response_wire_sample: Body not byte-readable via Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard. Endpoint /github/chat/threads/{id}/messages returns SSE stream of token/annotation events rendered into div.markdown-body. Final assistant text observed: '안녕하세요! GitHub Copilot입니다. 소프트웨어 개발을 도와드리겠습니다.' Raw SSE frames require CDP/HAR.
captures.frame_separator: SSE 'data:' lines separated by blank line (standard EventSource framing) — inferred from text/event-stream; exact bytes need CDP/HAR.
captures.dom_render_structure: GitHub React (react-partial / react-app custom elements, Primer CSS Modules). User turn = div.UserMessage-module__container__*; assistant turn = div.ChatMessage-module__content__* > div.ImmersiveChat-module__messageContent__* > div.markdown-body. Retry/model controls = div.ModelPicker-module__*. CopilotBadgeV2 on assistant. Code blocks via js-snippet-clipboard-copy.
captures.framework: React (GitHub react-partial hydration islands, Primer Design System CSS Modules). Not data-reactroot legacy; component-scoped CSS module class hashes.
captures.auth_state: logged-in (GitHub session; Copilot Free plan, model Claude Haiku 4.5)
captures.console_errors: Not separately polled; no functional errors observed. Note: SPA route change to /copilot/c/{id} cleared extension network buffer, so the messages POST was recovered via performance.getEntriesByType('resource') rather than read_network_requests.

notes: etap-BYPASSED clean baseline. Chat API on SEPARATE host api.individual.githubcopilot.com (key structural fact — block/inspect rules targeting github.com won't see chat traffic). SSE transport. Response rendered normally. Logged in (Copilot Free). read_network_requests buffer cleared on SPA nav; endpoint confirmed via perf resource entries. Wire bytes taint-guarded -> CDP/HAR for raw SSE.
